title: Nasdaq Teams With Talos on Tokenized Collateral Managenent
message_html: Nasdaq Teams With Talos on Tokenized Collateral Managenent ...
snippet: Nasdaq has launched a partnership with digital assets trading platform Talos. The collaboration will connect Talos’ digital asset infrastructure with Nasdaq’s Calypso and Trade Surveillance platforms to create a solution for managing tokenized collateral, the companies announced in a news release Mo
